inline_comments.message: Will `WEB-INF/cert` contain both the "packaged" certificates and the mounted certificates? What if certificates are *not* provided?

catalog `WEB-INF/cert` contains both certs and .jks files and they are all mounted to docker image. Although this docker-compouse is used for local development. As far as I know in case when certificates are not provided or if they are incorrect the start up of server fails, previously the certificates were copied from directory `WEB-INF/cert` to docker image in dockerfile
